possible_issues.message: Pumpkin carving modeled as a crafting_input transformation
possible_issues.evidence: Edge pumpkin -> carved_pumpkin uses type crafting_input; carving is a world action with shears rather than a grid recipe.
2 planks used as fuel for smelting 2 iron ingots; one plank can smelt 1.5 items, so 2 planks cover up to 3 items. This is consistent and not under-provisioned.

parsed.summary: Graph is well-formed, acyclic, has the correct sink (carved_pumpkin), and includes complete and correctly typed prerequisites with consistent quantities. No material defects found.
